'''Maxig Kress''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|Female]] from [[Tibro]] accused of stealing valuable experimental crystalline compounds from the [[Gandalom Paramedicinals, Inc.|Gandalom Paramedicinals, Incorporated]] corporation's facility on [[Corvanni IV]]. Her supposed crimes there included the destruction of two security [[Droid/Legends|droids]] and the injuring of several corporate guards. A 25,000 [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credit]] bounty was placed on her head by the corporation who wanted her alive. Kress was known to associate with [[Malindin Gevarak]], and sometimes used the alias Levesh Tolik.
